content.description: NurTani maintains the authenticity of the process from production to consumption transparently, ensuring our nature is preserved for future happiness.

visual.feature_desc: Grown naturally by farmers who truly care for nature.

header.description: Organic products still face challenges for farmers and consumers, even in an agricultural country.

challenge.caption: Mr. Yus grows bitter melon in Sembung, Mengwi, Badung, Bali

solution.description: NurTani connects farmers directly with buyers through product transparency.

product.description: Buy fresh produce from local farmers with transparent cultivation records and digital certificates.
